---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


## Setup
```{r}
library(qs)
library(ArchR)
library(Seurat)
library(furrr)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(scales)
library(ggrepel)
library(scCustomize)

source("../../scripts/common_aesthetics.R")
source(here::here("config/paths.R"))
pnames = names(position_colors)
names(position_colors) = case_when(pnames == "nido" ~ "nr",
                                     pnames == "ncl" ~ "nc",
                                     TRUE ~ pnames)

pnames2 = names(position_colors2)
names(position_colors2) = case_when(pnames2 == "nido" ~ "nr",
                                   pnames2 == "ncl" ~ "nc",
                                   TRUE ~ pnames2)
```


```{r}
proj_dir = "~/ssd/rstudio/multiome/motor-pathway/archr/motor-pathway_archr_processing_cluster-snrna-cr/"
analysis_prefix = "~/ssd/rstudio/multiome/motor-pathway/archr/motor-pathway_archr_processing_cluster-snrna-cr"
out_name = "peaks2geneslinks"
out_dir = file.path(analysis_prefix, out_name)
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = T)

addArchRThreads(threads = 36) 
```

```{r}
proj = loadArchRProject(proj_dir)
```

```{r}
clusters = unique(proj$cluster)
pair_list = list(ra = list("Glut-RA", c("Glut-Arco-1")),
                 hvc_1 = list("Glut-HVC-1", c("Glut-NC-1")),
                 hvc_2 = list("Glut-HVC-2", "Glut-NC-4"),
                 gaba = grep("GABA", clusters, value=T),
                 pre = clusters[grepl("Pre", clusters) & !grepl("GABA", clusters)],
                 arco_glut = grep("Arco|RA", clusters, value=T),
                 nido_glut = grep("HVC|NC|Nido", clusters, value=T),
                 neuroglia = grep("Astro|Oligo|OPC", clusters, value=T)
                 )
```

## Peak2Gene
```{r}
redo = T
if (redo) {
  
cell_names = getCellNames(proj)

cells_list = map(pair_list, function(pl) {
  cell_names[proj$cluster %in% unlist(pl)]
})

proj_split = map(cells_list, function(cells_cur) {
  addPeak2GeneLinks(
    ArchRProj = proj, 
    cellsToUse = cells_cur,
    reducedDims = "Harmony_ATAC", 
    useMatrix = "GeneExpressionMatrix"
  )
})
names(proj_split) = names(pair_list)
}
```

```{r}

if (redo) {
regions = unique(proj$region)

cell_regions = map(regions, function(reg) {
  cell_names[proj$region == reg]
})
proj_regions = map(cell_regions, function(cells_cur) {
  addPeak2GeneLinks(
    ArchRProj = proj, cellsToUse = cells_cur,
    reducedDims = "Harmony_ATAC", 
    useMatrix = "GeneExpressionMatrix"
  )
})
names(proj_regions) = names(regions)
}
```

```{r}
getPeak2GeneLinksAsBed = function(proj, 
                                  resolution = 100,
                                  corCutOff = .45,
                                  FDRCutOff = 1e-02,
                                  varCutOffATAC = 0.25,
                                  varCutOffRNA =  0.25 ) {
  p2g <- metadata(proj@peakSet)$Peak2GeneLinks
  p2g <- p2g[which(p2g$Correlation >= corCutOff & p2g$FDR <= FDRCutOff), ,drop=FALSE]
  
  if(!is.null(varCutOffATAC)){
    p2g <- p2g[which(p2g$VarQATAC > varCutOffATAC),]
  }
  
  if(!is.null(varCutOffRNA)){
    p2g <- p2g[which(p2g$VarQRNA > varCutOffRNA),]
  }
  
  peakSet = metadata(p2g)$peakSet
  peak_name = paste(seqnames(peakSet), paste(start(peakSet), end(peakSet), sep="-"), sep="_")
  geneSet = metadata(p2g)$geneSet
  peakSummits <- resize(metadata(p2g)$peakSet, 1, "center")
  geneStarts <- resize(metadata(p2g)$geneSet, 1, "start")
  
  if(!is.null(resolution)){
    summitTiles <- floor(start(peakSummits) / resolution) * resolution + floor(resolution / 2)
    geneTiles <- floor(start(geneStarts) / resolution) * resolution + floor(resolution / 2)
  }else{
    summitTiles <- start(peakSummits)
    geneTiles <- start(geneStarts)
  }
  
  loops <- ArchR:::.constructGR(
    seqnames = seqnames(peakSummits[p2g$idxATAC]),
    start = summitTiles[p2g$idxATAC],
    end = geneTiles[p2g$idxRNA]
  )
  
  mcols(loops)$value <- p2g$Correlation
  mcols(loops)$FDR <- p2g$FDR
  mcols(loops)$geneID = geneSet$name[p2g$idxRNA]
  mcols(loops)$peakID = peak_name[p2g$idxATAC]
  
  loops <- loops[order(mcols(loops)$value, decreasing=TRUE)]
  loops <- unique(loops)
  loops <- loops[width(loops) > 0]
  loops <- sort(sortSeqlevels(loops))
  
  bed = data.frame(chrom = seqnames(loops), 
                   chromStart = start(loops),
                   chromEnd = end(loops),
                   name = paste(loops$geneID, loops$peakID, sep="<>"),
                   score = round(1000 * loops$value) ,
                   value = loops$value,
                   exp = ".",
                   color = "red",
                   sourceChrom = seqnames(loops),
                   sourceStart = start(loops)-50,
                   sourceEnd = start(loops)+50,
                   sourceName = loops$geneID,
                   sourceStrand = ".",
                   targetChrom = seqnames(loops),
                   targetStart = end(loops)-50,
                   targetEnd = end(loops)+50,
                   targetName = loops$peakID,
                   targetStrand = "."
  )
  return(bed)
}
```


```{r}

cor_cut_offs = seq(0.2, .45, .05)

for (cor_cut_off in cor_cut_offs) {
if (redo) {
walk(names(proj_split), function(name_cur) {
  bed_fname = file.path(out_dir, sprintf("peak2geneLinks_%s_corCutOff-%s.bed", name_cur, cor_cut_off))
  p2g_bed = getPeak2GeneLinksAsBed(proj_split[[name_cur]], corCutOff = cor_cut_off)
    
  write_delim(p2g_bed, bed_fname, delim="\t", col_names=FALSE)
})

walk(names(proj_regions), function(name_cur) {
  bed_fname = file.path(out_dir, sprintf("peak2geneLinks_%s_corCutOff-%s.bed", name_cur, cor_cut_off))
  p2g_bed = getPeak2GeneLinksAsBed(proj_regions[[name_cur]], corCutOff = cor_cut_off)
    
  write_delim(p2g_bed, bed_fname, delim="\t", col_names=FALSE)
})
}
}
```
